text: Can I go here? Can I leave here? I want to go out. Can you drop me off here, please? The biggest lie about learning English, that you need more vocabulary? You don't. You need to start speaking. Stacy, what advice would you give to a beginner who wants to improve their English quickly? Just talk to me every day. Daily practice with AI tutors works wonders. That's why fluently works. It's like a speaking partner in your pocket. Stop learning English. Start speaking with fluently app.
